'''dayate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:qualmishly|qualmishly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-y-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qualmishly|qualmishly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dayate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:dayate|dayate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dayatesher|dayatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dayatesherĂ«m|dayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dayatero|dayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dayateshĂ«|dayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dayateshĂ«m|dayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidayatero|gokidayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidayateshĂ«|gokidayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidayateshĂ«m|gokidayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godayankerom|godayankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godayankeshĂ«|godayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godayankeshĂ«m|godayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godayankeya|godayankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dayaterom|dayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dayatemu|dayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dayateya|dayateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidayaterom|gokidayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidayatemu|gokidayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidayateya|gokidayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:dayayate|dayayate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dayayatesher|dayayatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dayayatesherĂ«m|dayayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dayayatero|dayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dayayateshĂ«|dayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dayayateshĂ«m|dayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidayayatero|gokidayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidayayateshĂ«|gokidayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidayayateshĂ«m|gokidayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godayayankerom|godayayankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godayayankeshĂ«|godayayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godayayankeshĂ«m|godayayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godayayankeya|godayayankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dayayaterom|dayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dayayatemu|dayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dayayateya|dayayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidayayaterom|gokidayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidayayatemu|gokidayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidayayateya|gokidayayateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dĂŠyĂŠte|dĂŠyĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dĂŠyĂŠtesher|dĂŠyĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m|dĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠyĂŠtero|dĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|dĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|dĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠyĂŠtero|gokidĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|gokidĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godĂŠyĂŠnkerom|godĂŠyĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«|godĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godĂŠyĂŠnkeya|godĂŠyĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠyĂŠterom|dĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠyĂŠtemu|dĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dĂŠyĂŠteya|dĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠyĂŠterom|gokidĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠyĂŠtemu|gokidĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidĂŠyĂŠteya|gokidĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:dafyafte|dafyafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dafyaftesher|dafyaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafyaftesherĂ«m|dafyaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafyaftero|dafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dafyafteshĂ«|dafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafyafteshĂ«m|dafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafyaftero|gokidafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidafyafteshĂ«|gokidafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafyafteshĂ«m|gokidafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godafyafnkerom|godafyafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godafyafnkeshĂ«|godafyafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godafyafnkeshĂ«m|godafyafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godafyafnkeya|godafyafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafyafterom|dafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafyaftemu|dafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dafyafteya|dafyafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafyafterom|gokidafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafyaftemu|gokidafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidafyafteya|gokidafyafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
